examples.name: dual_signal_blend
examples.title: Dual Signal Blend (Momentum + Mean Reversion)
examples.description: Combines a ROC momentum signal with an RSI mean reversion signal using equal-weight forecast combining. Loads daily data, branches into two parallel signal pipelines, and merges with ForecastCombiner. Demonstrates parallel branches and signal composition.

examples.name: entry_exit_rsi
examples.title: RSI Entry/Exit with Threshold Crossing
examples.description: A mean-reversion strategy using RSI with threshold-based entry and exit signals. Normalizes RSI cross-sectionally, then uses ThresholdCross on the z-scored signal for binary entry/exit decisions. EqualWeightSizer converts to portfolio weights, and SelectionToSignalConverter manages 5-day hold periods. Demonstrates the discrete entry/exit pattern — no forecast scaling needed.

examples.name: ewmac_position_sizing
examples.title: EWMAC with Position Sizing
examples.description: An EWMA crossover signal with a complete position sizing pipeline. After generating the forecast, computes return volatility, converts to vol-targeted weights, aggregates with IDM, and caps leverage. Demonstrates factories and the unitless position sizing chain.
